message:
feat(gateway): add REST routes for tool integrations

Add REST API routes for multiple tool integrations:

Meta Skill (ms) routes (/api/v1/ms):
- POST /search: Semantic search across knowledge bases
- POST /entries: Add knowledge entries
- GET /entries/{id}: Retrieve entry
- DELETE /entries/{id}: Remove entry
- POST /rebuild-index: Rebuild search index
- GET /status: System status

RCH routes (/api/v1/rch):
- GET /status: Compilation service status
- GET /workers: List worker nodes
- GET /agents: List active agents
- GET /doctor: Run diagnostics

Process Triage (pt) routes (/api/v1/pt):
- GET /status: Process management status
- POST /scan: Scan running processes
- POST /kill: Terminate processes
- GET /history: Process history

XF routes (/api/v1/xf):
- GET /status: X archive search status
- POST /search: Search archive
- GET /stats: Archive statistics
- GET /tweet/{id}: Get specific tweet

Each route includes proper validation, error handling,
and structured JSON responses following API standards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
